entry.title: Add defaulted 2nd line item to invoice creation during run time
entry.content:

I got a requirement to add defaulted line item for all invoice during creation, this requirement is something like if there is invoice for purchasing of TV, during invoice creation INSTALLATION service should be added as a 2nd line item by default during invoice creation before save.

This requirement has to be done in ECC, kindly suggest the solutions

Thanks

Udaykiran

entry.title: Re: Individual Full Transmission Start Date (FTSD)
entry.content:
Just adding an interesting detail.

To maintain the entries on the table PAOCFEC_PN_FTSD, you can use the Tcode ECPAO_PN_FTSD or program ECPAO_MNTN_PAOCFEC_PN_FTSD. There are not a specific view to maintain the table by Tcode sm30.

I hope it helps to someone 🙂

entry.title: Re: SAC App designer - dropdown list shows all members of...
entry.content:
Hello- unfortunately I'm not sure you can populate a single dropdown exactly as you wish. You can populate all members from a dimension in a single dropdown, but it will not be indented as per your screenshot, it will just be a flat list:

// "Model" has to be added as a planning model in the scripting section (add planning model, then choose your model)

var members = Model.getMembers("DIMENSION",{limit:3000}); // This gets the list of members from your dimension

var list_array = ArrayUtils.create(Type.string); 

for(var i=0;i<members.length;i++) {

list_array.push(members[i].id);

}

console.log(dropdown_list);

// The above will take all of the members in the dimension, and populate an array with the IDs. This is then written to the console to check you are happy.

You can then add some code to populate your dropdown like below:

for (var j=0;j<list_array.length;j++) {

Dropdown_1.addItem(list_array[j]);

}

I'm not great at the coding so there are probably better ways to write this, but this approach works. However, this will just bring the full list of dimension members into your dropdown, without the indentations/hierarchy view.

One suggestion could be to have several dropdowns which cascade into each other. 

For example, the first dropdown is the first level of the hierarchy, then second dropdown populates based on selection from the first (based on code "onSelect" of Dropdown for Level 1), and so on. 

E.g. 

Within the "For" loop above, you can replace with a condition to check a property (imagine this is a level of the hierarchy):

if(list_array[i].properties["Level"]==="1") {

list_level_1.push(members[i].id);

}

and continue for multiple levels. Each level can populate its own dropdown. The first bit of code getting the members of the dimension can be added to the "oninitialisation" of the story, and the cascading dropdowns can be populated using "onSelect" of the dropdowns.

entry.title: Re: How to calculate the time difference between the same...
entry.content:
here is a solution:
define the following variables:

v_TimeBetween (h):   =TimeBetween(Previous([Check In Date and time];Row;([Case Number];[Actual Procedure]));[Check In Date and time];MinutePeriod ) ForEach ([Case Number])/60

v_status:  =If([v_TimeBetween (h)] < 48) Then 1

..

hope it helps

entry.title: Re: Change region cache use SPEL V2105
entry.content: what should be the max limit for regioncache.entryregion.size? By default it is 100K.

entry.title: Re: How to create accessible PDF's from Crystal Reports 1...
entry.content:
FYI - 13.0.4000.0 is the version of the framework CR for VS is, the actual version is listed in Programs and features or checking the registry.

Crystal Reports will only export in one PDF format for backward compatibility, there is no option to select the PDF type.

You will need to use a third party tool or use Adobe's API's to save the outputed format type.

Here's one way of Exporting in CR for VS:

private void ExportToPDFRAS_Click(object sender, EventArgs e)
{
    //CrystalDecisions.CrystalReports.Engine.ReportDocument rpt = new CrystalDecisions.CrystalReports.Engine.ReportDocument();
    ISCDReportClientDocument rcd;

    //rpt.Load("c:\\Reports\\Group.rpt");

    rcd = rptClientDoc;

    // Declare a PrintOutputController to allow documents to be exported to PDF
    PrintOutputController rasPrintOutputController;
    CrReportExportFormatEnum rasReportExportFormat;
    CrystalDecisions.Shared.DiskFileDestinationOptions diskOpts = CrystalDecisions.Shared.ExportOptions.CreateDiskFileDestinationOptions();
    //CrystalDecisions.ReportAppServer.ReportDefModel.ExportOptions PDFExpOpts = new CrystalDecisions.ReportAppServer.ReportDefModel.ExportOptions();

    //diskOpts.DiskFileName = "d:\\reports1.pdf";

    //PDFExpOpts.FormatOptions = CreateBookmarksFromGroupTree = true;
    //PDFExpOpts.FirstPageNumber = 1;
    //PDFExpOpts.LastPageNumber = 1;
    //PDFExpOpts.UsePageRange = true;
    //rcd.PrintOutputController.ExportEx(PDFExpOpts);

    // Set the CrReportExportFormatEnum to export the report as a PDF file.
    rasReportExportFormat = CrReportExportFormatEnum.crReportExportFormatPDF;
    //rasReportExportFormat = CrReportExportFormatEnum.crReportExportFormatCharacterSeparatedValues;

    rasPrintOutputController = rcd.PrintOutputController;

    // Use the Export() method of the PrintOutputController to export the report to a ByteArray.
    ByteArray tempByteArray = rasPrintOutputController.Export(rasReportExportFormat, 0);
    Byte[] byteStreamOutput = tempByteArray.ByteArray;

    System.IO.Stream oStream;
    byte[] byteArray = null;

    oStream = rpt.ExportToStream(CrystalDecisions.Shared.ExportFormatType.PortableDocFormat);
    //oStream = rpt.ExportToStream(CrystalDecisions.Shared.ExportFormatType.CharacterSeparatedValues);
    byteArray = new byte[oStream.Length];
    oStream.Read(byteArray, 0, Convert.ToInt32(oStream.Length - 1));

    // this is used to verify the file so I saved it to disk
    try
    {
        System.IO.File.Create(diskOpts.DiskFileName, Convert.ToInt32(oStream.Length - 1)).Close();
    }
    catch (Exception ex)
    {
        btnSQLStatement.Text = "Create ERROR: " + ex.Message;
        //return;
    }

    try
    {
        string outputFileName = "";
        string MyRptName = rpt.FileName.ToString();
        outputFileName = MyRptName.Substring(9, rpt.FileName.Length - 9);
        outputFileName = outputFileName.Substring(0, (outputFileName.Length - 4)) + "1.pdf";

        System.IO.File.OpenWrite(diskOpts.DiskFileName).Write(byteArray, 0, Convert.ToInt32(oStream.Length - 1));
        System.IO.File.SetAttributes(diskOpts.DiskFileName, System.IO.FileAttributes.Directory);
        oStream.Close();
    }
    catch (Exception ex)
    {
        btnSQLStatement.Text = "Write ERROR: " + ex.Message;
        //return;
    }

    //rpt.ExportToDisk(ExportFormatType.PortableDocFormat, "c:\\temp\\100000026.pdf");



    //rcd.Open("c:\\Reports\\Group.rpt");

    ////bool CreateBookmarksFromGroupTree { set; get; }
    //CrystalDecisions.ReportAppServer.ReportDefModel.ISCRPDFExportFormatOptions pdfOpts = new PDFExportFormatOptions();
    //CrystalDecisions.ReportAppServer.ReportDefModel.ExportOptions exportOpts = new CrystalDecisions.ReportAppServer.ReportDefModel.ExportOptions();
    //CrystalDecisions.Shared.DiskFileDestinationOptions diskOpts = CrystalDecisions.Shared.ExportOptions.CreateDiskFileDestinationOptions();

    //diskOpts.DiskFileName = "c:\\reports\\reports1.pdf";

    ////pdfOpts.CreateBookmarksFromGroupTree = true;
    //exportOpts.FormatOptions = pdfOpts;

    //rcd.PrintOutputController.Export(CrReportExportFormatEnum.crReportExportFormatPDF);
    //.rcd.PrintOutputController.Export(exportOpts);

}

entry.title: Standard CDS view as app
entry.content:
Hi,

In public cloud, what is the easiest way to show a stanard CDS view as an app?

I basically want to provide our users the same functionality as the customer data browser app, without giving them access to this app. (and only for a single CDS view)

Best regards,

Kristian

entry.title: Re: SAP API OData Security Part I - Terminologies
entry.content:
Hi @ravi_paul 

Amazing blogs quite informative. Could you help here i just have a scenario 

I have exposed an S4HANA table as Odata service in SAP system. The Odata service works perfectly fine when tested with CRUD operations in SAP gateway client as  well as Browser. Also tested the same in Postman it works fine.

screenshot for reference

@

 

 

My question is : I want to consume this into an Non SAP Application using OAuth client where this data will be used to in this non sap application to process further. should i follow the test that you have mentioned above to create oAuth 2.0 and then pass the details in the below application?

Can you help here
Thanks in advance

Regards,

Mellinda

entry.title: Re: SAP_COM_0008
entry.content:
Hi @Wenny 

 

The Arrangement SAP_COM_0008 is available with the activation of the scope item 1RO  as mentioned in the KBA https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/3357532

 

If it doesn't appear on your system then the scope item is probably not activated

 

Best Regards

Enda

entry.title: Re: error while copying purchase contract using manage pu...

Amazing blogs quite informative. Could you help here i just have a scenario 

I have exposed an S4HANA table as Odata service in SAP system. The Odata service works perfectly fine when tested with CRUD operations in SAP gateway client as  well as Browser. Also tested the same in Postman it works fine.

My question is : I want to consume this into an Non SAP Application using OAuth client where this data will be used to in this non sap application to process further. should i follow the test that you have mentioned above to create oAuth 2.0 and then pass the details in the below application?

Mellinda

entry.title: Re: SAP CPQ 2.0 - How to Use " Table Tags " to get data i...
entry.content:
Hello Eric , 

I have solved the issue , if we want to select from a custom table during Document Generation of the form , we can use this

Spoiler

<<Q_TAG( <* TABLE ( SELECT EN FROM DocCont_AddtionalDetail WHERE OutputType = 'Quote' AND ContentSections = 'Footer' AND SalesOrg = '<*CTX( Quote.SelectedMarket.MarketCode )*>' ) *> )>>

I have another question for you Eric , 

how can i  submit a case for CPQ Support Team or any other team ? 

i would appreciate if you can help me with that

entry.title: POST Requests Being Converted to GET in SAP BTP Cloud Foundry Environment
entry.content:
Hi all,

I hope this message finds you well.

I am currently facing an issue with my application backend, which I have developed using the Python Django framework. The application consists of several APIs that have been thoroughly tested and work perfectly fine when run locally. The APIs correctly handle different request types (e.g., POST, GET, PUT, etc.) without any issues.

However, after deploying the application to the Cloud Foundry environment on SAP BTP, I’ve encountered a strange issue where all incoming requests are being interpreted as GET requests, regardless of the original request method. This problem surfaced suddenly, despite the application working as expected after the initial deployment.

What I’ve Tried:

  • I’ve thoroughly reviewed my application code, including all route configurations, middleware, and view logic, to ensure there are no issues that could cause this behavior.
  • I’ve also checked for any anomalies in the request and response logs while running the application locally versus in Cloud Foundry.
  • Additionally, I verified that there are no URL malformations or issues with the way requests are being sent to the backend.

Despite these efforts, the problem persists only when the application is deployed on Cloud Foundry. I’m reaching out to see if anyone in the community has experienced a similar issue or can provide insights into what might be causing Cloud Foundry to interpret all requests as GET requests.

Any guidance or suggestions for further troubleshooting steps would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance for your support!

Best regards,
Keerthi

entry.title: Re: Use SAP SuccessFactors Compensation to Provide Pay Equity Adjustments
entry.content:
Hello,

Is there any way to translate custom warning validations "Gap Rectified" etc.

Thank you.

Rahul

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano 

My name is Youssef Tarek, and I am a recent graduate with nearly one year of experience in the technology field. During this time, I have been actively involved in learning and applying SAP technologies, specifically within the Material Management (MM) module. My journey in SAP has sparked a deep interest in furthering my skills and knowledge within this ecosystem.

As someone early in my career, I am highly motivated to expand my expertise and believe that the Digital Skills Initiative will provide me with the perfect opportunity to achieve this. My goal is to gain certification in SAP to solidify my foundational knowledge and open new doors for career growth.

I am particularly interested in this program because I understand the challenges of breaking into the technology industry, especially as a fresh graduate. The support and structured learning that this initiative offers would be invaluable in helping me overcome these challenges and establish a strong foundation in SAP.

I look forward to contributing to and growing within the SAP community.

Best regards,
Youssef Tarek

entry.title: Re: Copy control routine to copy ship to party your refer...
entry.content:
I believe a Custom copy routine (by copying the standard Copy routine and adding your code) would be the best way forward here...

We too have implemented a custom copy routine to copy KDMAT (Customer Material Number). 

Thanks,

entry.title: Re: SAP CPQ 2.0 - How to Use " Table Tags " to get data i...
entry.content:
I have solved the issue , if we want to select from a custom table during Document Generation of the form , we can use this

Spoiler

<<Q_TAG( <* TABLE ( SELECT EN FROM DocCont_AddtionalDetail WHERE OutputType = 'Quote' AND ContentSections = 'Footer' AND SalesOrg = '<*CTX( Quote.SelectedMarket.MarketCode )*>' ) *> )>>

entry.title: Re: How to change the length and number ranges of Serial...
entry.content: The Blog https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/serial-number-range-customizing-in-s-4hana-cloud/ba-p/13560010 outlines the customizing available for Serial Number Ranges in S/4HANA Cloud

entry.title: Re: Inbound/outbound delivery enquiries
entry.content: 客户您好，您可以参考scope item：1FM（https://me.sap.com/processnavigator/SolS/EARL_SolS-013/2408/SolP/1FM?region=CN）去测试采购收货质检相关步骤，请参考BNQ（https://help.sap.com/doc/43027e802956fde24c86e1b3ce753ff9/2408/en-US/BNQ_S4CLD2408_Master_Data_EN_XX.pdf）完善QM检验计划等相关设置。在完善了质检相关的设置之后，激活了物料主数据中的检验类型01(Goods Receipt Insp. for Purchase Order)，基于内向交货单收货过账则会产生检验批，您可再对检验批进行后续质检相关动作如使用决策等。

entry.title: Re: POST Requests Being Converted to GET in SAP BTP Cloud Foundry Environment
entry.content: Can you provide more details about your setup: Is the client a user or a technical system? Do you already use a SAP Approuter for the user facing case? Have you secured the API via XSUAA?

entry.title: Re: error while copying purchase contract using manage pu...
entry.content: i have found out the main issue as you said it's related to the address data, The telephone number must be consistent with the Country selected but what didn't make sense same Contract was copied without a problem in the GUI transaction while it didn't get created and provided the above error through Fiori app "manage purchasing contracts", it's related to the address data, telephone number must be consistent with Country selected

entry.title: Restrict creation of Inbound delivery until Goods issuance is done by the supplying plant
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have an Intra-Company STO scenario configured wherein an STO is created by the supplier site to transfer the Raw material stock to another receiving site.

The requirement by the business on the receiving site is to have a validation control or error message to restrict creating an Inbound Delivery with reference to the STO using tcode VL31N unless the Goods has been issued by the supplying site. Becasue, most of the times, user created Inbound delivery as per the total quantity of STO. However, as per the stock availability, the supplying site has delivered partial quantity.

Is there any standard way that we can achieve this requirement?

Appreciate your precious input, advise or feedback.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Enable to enable OAuth for Odata service created in S...
entry.content: Please read the blog series from Tobias Hofmann on OAuth that he posted in 2020: https://www.itsfullofstars.de/blog/all-content/

entry.title: Changes In Funds Management with S/4 Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello experts, I need some insights on the changes in Funds Management with the S/4 Public Cloud version. It appears that with the cloud version, budgets need to be set up at the Budget Account, Cost Center, and Fund levels. And the budget account can only be derived from the GL master.

In the earlier on-prem versions, we used to set budgets at the commitment item and Fund center levels, which did not involve the GL and Cost center levels. This allowed for greater flexibility in budget allocation at various levels. However, it seems that this flexibility is now restricted. The budgeting process at the GL level and Cost center level is also available in Cost Center Budgeting. In light of this, I am wondering why clients should opt for Fund Management. Furthermore, it seems that Fund, which was optional earlier, is now mandatory.

Could someone please confirm if I am understanding these changes correctly or if I am missing something?

@iklovski @George_Yu

entry.title: S/4HANA Purchase Requisition: Delivery Address Reference by Default
entry.content:
Hi all,

I'm on an S/4HANA system S4CORE 108 SP1 (so 2023 latest).

❓On tile "F2229 - Manage Purchase Requisitions - Pro" : I need to set a default delivery address by reference when I add an item ❓

The BADI "ME_PROCESS_REQ_CUST" is used by the tile, I can adapt the ITEMS logic using the PROCESS_ITEM method, but it's impossible to define a default address in the tile by this way.
Or maybe I missed something ...

I also tried via enhancement spot "MM_PUR_S4_PR" but I can't see how to adapt the delivery address with this enhancement spot.

Another enhancement spot "MM_PUR_S4_SSPPR" have a BADI "MM_PUR_S4_SSPPR_DEF_DEL_ADDRES" but it's not used by the tile "F2229". It is used by the tile "F1639A - My Purchase Requesition New" and this new tile can't work with address type "Reference".

No Address Type "Reference" for tile "F1639A" :

Do you have any ideas on how to do this ?

Thanks,
Youri

entry.title: Re: Authenticate via Basic Auth or Client Certificate aga...
entry.content: Basic Authentication doesn't work when the Azure AD is connected via SAML. IAS is a must. You do not want to use Basic Authentication with CAP in production.

entry.title: Is is possible to do quick sum up/average by selecting specific cells in SAP IBP Planner Workspace?
entry.content:
I would like to see sum up or average value of couple of cells selected, similar to Excel functionality, so, let's say if I have 100pcs in June and 30pcs in February - by selecting two months I would like to see 130 pcs calculated and displayed on the fly, not the whole KF total. Is it possible in web interface - Planner Workspace?

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Issues with an INT64 parameter in a Com UFL..
entry.content: R&D is still looking into the issue, He confirmed Int32 and Int16 does work but to get consistent results you must register the UFL using 64bit regasm for CR 2020 to use.

entry.title: Re: MC.9 - how report works
entry.content: Hi,

entry.title: Data migration - Automatic mapping in "Migrate your data" app SAP S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

We are currently working on data migration for our customer and we wondered if it is possible to do automatic mapping in the "Migrate your data" app between legacy data and SAP data?

Example: For Purchasing info record migration, the Business Partner Supplier SAP ID is needed in the migration file. Is it possible to perform an automatic mapping of legacy Supplier ID and SAP BP Supplier ID via the Mapping tasks of "Migrate your data" app?

We would like to avoid data mapping errors.

Thank you for you help.

Regards,

Nelly

entry.title: AIF Interface monitoring in SolMan
entry.content:
Hi All,

We are in the process of setting up AIF interface monitoring in SOLMAN 7.2, Is it possible to monitor the errors of the interface at once, instead of provided details of each interface details.

I have tried giving "*" under interface name, Namespace, etc., but it is not working as expected.

entry.title: BADI to validate while posting Journal entry
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We are trying to find BADI to validate Journal entry posting, 

Requirement is : If Journal entry is starting with M series then credit and debit amount should be same.

                           If not, it should throw an error message.

Let me know if we have any Badi available for this?

we have tried below BADI : Journal entry Validation

                                           Journal entry header Validation , journal entry item Validation

But we dont have credit and debit amount in these Badi.

Let us know if we have any BADI for this scenario.

Regards,

Jagadhatri

please check out the discussion Start CAP without express to run a Cloud Foundry task that I've posted in February. I came up with this solution: srv/cap-startup.js. I wanted to avoid to use cds.test.

Best Regards
Gregor

entry.title: Looking for same answer here .. please suggest.
entry.content: How to do mass upload of Contact Person data to Business Partner BP in S4.

entry.title: how to set up workflow when employee & partner contact modifies the ticket.
entry.content:
I am using ticket routing rules by employee.


I want the customer(blue) and the assigned employee(orange) in the image to receive notifications and emails when they interact with the ticket.

 


In the image, the text highlighted in blue,  is the partner contact of the Account highlighted in yellow.

Requirement 1: When the partner contact creates a ticket, the assigned employee should receive a notification. I also want to send an email to the employee.

Requirement 2: When the employee modifies the ticket and wants to notify the partner contact, how can I send an alert after changing the status to 'in process'?

Requirement 3: How do I send a notification and email to the partner contact when employee reply a ticket?

Requirement 4: Can I set it up so that every time the partner contact (i.e., the customer) modifies the ticket, a notification and email are sent to the employee?

I have already configured it as shown in the attached Ticket2 image based on the information from this "https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/2539965", but it is not working.

Please guide me on how to set up a workflow to send notifications every time the customer or employee modifies the ticket.

entry.title: Re: Launchpad Home Page - Open App New Browser Tab - Lean State
entry.content: Hi, did you find a solution for this? I am currently having the same issue, would be thankful for every hint. Thanks !

entry.title: How to get the MC.9 report data for prior periods?
entry.content:
Hi.

Currenty we are in 9 period, can we get the 1 period mc.9 report data?

The data should match with the balance sheet.

Following steps are using to generate the data.

1. Delete the data using this program RMCSISCP, info stucturs S031 & S032 and version 000.

2.Regenarate the data by using RMCBNEUA for S031 version 000, Name of run 02.04.202D and 

RMCBNEUB for S032 version 000.

Thanks.

entry.title: Clear GR/IR Clearing account does not match display line items in General Ledger
entry.content:
Dear,

When checking the overview in the app clear GR/IR Clearing account the data there does not match with the values for the clearing GL account in the app Display Line items in General Ledger. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Clear GR/IR Clearing account does not match display l...
entry.content:
See kba 3094021 Manual Posting should not be done on GR/IR Clearing Account

In this kba you will see the following stated;

As reference in GR/IR Clearing Account Maintenance

"Quantity differences between goods receipt and invoice receipt for a purchase order result in a balance on the GR/IR clearing account.

If the quantity invoiced is larger than the quantity received, the system expects further goods receipts for this purchase order to clear the balance.
If the quantity received is larger than the quantity invoiced, the system expects further invoices for this purchase order to clear the balance.
You can also clear differences for delivery costs.
If no more goods or invoices are to be received for this purchase order, you must clear the balance manually.

This can be done in different ways:

You can return the extra goods to the supplier.
You can cancel the invoice and post a corrected invoice or a credit memo for the surplus posted quantity.
You can clear the GR/IR clearing account"

In App Display Purchase Order advanced (App ID ME23N) Display Purchase order

and goto Purchase order History.

Select Change View and Choose GR/IR Assgt. 

Check reference 

here you can see 

The quantity for the invoice receipt and The quantity for the Goods receipt and if there is a difference. 

Scope item Monitoring of Goods and Invoice Receipts (‏2V7‏)allows monitoring and Reconcile GR/IR Accounts

 

The use of the app Clear GR/IR Clearing Account app ID MR11 is outlined in help documentation. 

Use

With this app you can clear the goods receipt and invoice receipt clearing account. If quantity differences exist between goods receipt and invoice receipt for a purchase order, then a balance results on the goods receipt and invoice receipt (GR/IR) clearing account. If the quantity invoiced is larger than the quantity received, the system expects further goods receipts for this purchase order to clear the balance. If the quantity received is larger than the quantity invoiced, the system expects further invoices for this purchase order to clear the balance. You can also clear differences for delivery costs.

 

See also referenced in kba 3094021 Manual Posting should not be done on GR/IR Clearing Account

 

Use job "Automatic Clearing" or "GR/IR Automatic Clearing" in app "Schedule General Ledger Jobs" to execute the automatic clearing.

entry.title: Re: Task 3 - Enhancing CDS View Entities with Annotations

entry.title: Re: Task 4 - Implement Criticality feature and create an Object page

entry.title: Re: RF: Verification profile settings for picking
entry.content:
Hi @jschuenemann ,

yes, you can configure which fields should be verified in RF with the configuration activity (SSCUI) Define Warehouse-Specific Verification Determination. 

Best regards,
Christian

entry.title: Re: In Resource scheduling app - Operation cannot be scheduled automatically
entry.content: Hi, sorry to say but with the details provided, I cannot say for sure, what the reason for the message and the non-scheduling of an operation is. Could you please either provide more details (capacity details maintained on the work centers, shifts, thresholds, etc., schedule details for which the error occurs as well as the one that does not show the error, etc.) OR issue a support ticket to component CA-RSH-EAM. Thanks, Markus

entry.title: Re: SAP B1 HANA - attachment folder is frequently not mou...
entry.content: On August 13th, we set up the auto mount and added it to the schedule. Since then, it hasn’t occurred. The customer is continuing to monitor the situation.

entry.title: Re: CPM | PUll integration printing - Print to certain us...
entry.content:
Hi @castin ,

I suppose each work center has its own storage bin assigned to it? Did you already try to determine the printer based on the storage bin? You can in fact even use the work center itself as a parameter:

Best regards,
Christian

entry.title: New How-To-Videos: Learn how to make use of the Customer Insights Dashboard
entry.content:
The Customer Insights dashboard in SAP for Me provides a holistic, customizable overview of SAP Solutions across all support contracts and all deployment types. 

We have created some short and crisp How-to Videos for you. Just pick and choose the ones relevant to you and learn how to get the most out of the functionalities in the Customer Insights dashboard.  

  • Getting Started with the Customer Insights Dashboard in SAP for Me 

This video will empower you with the knowledge how to start and to make the most of the Customer Insights Dashboard and leverage it to gain invaluable insights into your solution situation.  

  • Maximizing Your Insights with Personalization in the Customer Insights Dashboard 

With these tips, you can streamline your workflow and create tailored reporting according to your individual needs by using the customization and personalization options in the Customer Insights Dashboard.

  • Analyzing Your System Landscape in the Customer Insights Dashboard 

With this video, you'll be able to gain valuable insights into your System Landscape, get an overview, or easily find the systems you would like to focus on using the Customer Insights dashboard. 

  • Closed Cases in the Customer Insights Dashboard 

With this explanation, you'll be able to get a detailed and focused overview on your cases to better analyze and optimize your SAP cases using the Customer Insights Dashboard 

  • Cloud Availability in the Customer Insights Dashboard 

With these insights, you will be able to utilize the Cloud Availability section to quickly find which systems have been affected by unplanned downtime, how critical it was for the SLA, and analyze the availability history across all systems and solutions. 

To access the new dashboard, make sure your S-user possesses the 'Display Support Situation Reporting' authorization, which can be provided by your super administrator. For more details kindly refer to this KBA.  

Please visit the Customer Insights  portal page to stay up-to-date and get all information on access and authorization, the latest updates, road map, trainings and info sessions, FAQs and more.  

SAP for Me is made for you! 

Related blogs:  all related blogs to ‘Customer Insights’ reporting dashboard.

entry.title: My Inbox Extension Application: Standard modules not loading
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have an extension of My Inbox application which has stopped working. This was migrated from old system and none of the experts who worked on it are there in the team. Issue is that in my odata calls, we have few custom data coming in which is supposed to be formatted through my inbox standard conversion files(These can be found inside standard my inbox app under util folder)

But for some reason when we run the application these files are not getting fetched. I don't see the in network tab or in component-preload.

 

jQuery.sap.require("cross.fnd.fiori.inbox.util.Conversions");
This don't seem to be loading the file. or somehow its not getting linked with the formatter.



I am getting below issue in the application

This is my component

This is the initial part of my custom controller

This is the fragment where I am using these standard js files as formatter

My UI is coming like this because of this

entry.title: Deep Association - RAP Design Time Error
entry.content:
Problem

Attempting to transport a view extension of the SAP standard view C_OBJPGMAINTNOTIFICATION suddenly resulted in an error in a simple view extension, although the DD was successfully activated. The error message is displayed in an automatically added line:

Error message: CL_SADL_GW_CDS_P_ASSOCIATION\CLASS=LCX_DEEP_ASSOCI-CX_ROOT: An exception was raised. RAP Designtime

Debugging Results:

  • Error message now also suddenly appears in other view extensions of C_OBJPGMAINTNOTIFICATION. These view extensions have long been transported to the Q-system
  • Check in another test system with the same version and without extensions -> same error
  • Suddenly the same error appeared in the main view C_OBJPGMAINTNOTIFICATION
    • Line 1191 is marked as an error:

 

// @Consumption.filter.hidden: true
//  _ObjPgMaintNotifWithDesc, //Obsolete association
   @Consumption.filter.hidden: true
   _MaintNotificationTP._MaintenanceOrder._MaintenanceOrderType._Text as _OrderTypeText,

 

 
  • Further attempts were made to find clues using a breakpoint in the class CL_SADL_GW_CDS_P_ASSOCIATION\CLASS METHOD if_sadl_gw_cds_parser_assoc~inherit, but this failed.

Assumption:

  • The consistency check is asynchronous to the check in ADT
  • The use of a deep association is not accepted by the consistency check, but not criticized by the ADT syntax check.
  • The standard view violates its own rules

Does anybody experienced the same or a similiar issue? Any ideas on to solve this or mitigate? Working on a SAP on-premise system.

entry.title: Re: My Inbox Extension Application: Standard modules not loading
entry.content: Any help will be appreciated 😊

entry.title: Re: AI Powered Invoice Management with SAP RAP and ABAP on Cloud – Part 3
entry.content: Simple yet powerful. Thanks so much

entry.title: Profit center is not getting displayed in the reports.
entry.content:
Why profit center is not getting displayed in the reports?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Profit center is not getting displayed in the reports.
entry.content:
There is no assigned profit center for the corresponding G/L account in the report.

If Profit center is not in the Journal entry, it won't be filled in the reports.

The reason why it may not be filled in the journal entry in the first place is that there is no default profit center assigned in Business configuration activity "Default Profit Center".

You have to maintain this for all subledgers as per your business requirement.

So, if profit center is not derived based on the various master data objects in the source document it will at least pick up a Profit center from here if required.

entry.title: Re: Supplier invoice changes
entry.content:
Hello,

Thank you for your question.

Can you please check whether the following app documentation answers your question?

Supplier Invoices List, App ID: F1060A

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0e602d466b99490187fcbb30d1dc897c/ad246b54f94c8f4ce10000000a4450e5.html?locale=en-US
 
Kind regards,
Henrike

entry.title: Re: What is an Enterprise Architect (EA) and what are the core aspects of enterprise architecture?
entry.content:
hi @ChristianNyffengger  @pinnelli  @wermic @Margit_Wagner 

it looks like it is a link for partners indeed.

But I would strongly recommend that you take a look at SAP LeanIX wiki for EA, they have very good material there I've gotta say, for anyone interested in understanding what EA is.

SAP LeanIX Wiki – A Glossary of Modern IT Terms

What is Enterprise Architecture? Framework & Process | LeanIX

Enterprise Architecture HUB | SAP LeanIX

best!

entry.title: Re: Exploring Data Access Control: Ensuring Consistency from SAC to Datasphere and Back - Blog 2
entry.content:
Everything would have been so much easier if SAP had developed Datasphere being able to host Planning models for SAC right from the start 😞

It still is such a long way until this feature will finally be available.

Probably thousands of SAC Planning models have been developed since early 2022, which all need to be replaced sooner or later by the Datasphere planning model - unfortunately and hopefully at the same time.

BR, Martin

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano,

This is Neeraj K Gupta from India. I am a PMP and CSM certified Agile Project & Delivery Manager with two decades of experience in managing strategic projects for top investment banks and fintech firms across Europe, Asia, and the Americas. I have varied experience across Business Analysis, Scrum, Agile, Project and Delivery Management. Unfortunately through a sad twist of fate, I got laid-off from my organization in the last week of June 2024. I have been without a job for last 2 months and things have been a bit difficult with 2 college going kids. 

I have been interested in SAP for a while now and feel that since most of my Project Management experience is in the area of Product Implementations, by joining the SAP Digital Initiatives Program I would develop knowledge in SAP S\4 Hana Implementations using the SAP Activate methodology. 

I am 47 years old and identify myself with the category - 'People looking to switch their careers mid-life'. I would appreciate if you could consider my application for free SAP certification and help me launch my next career phase as a SAP Project Manager. 

Looking forward to a positive response from your end. 

Warm Regards,

Neeraj K. Gupta

entry.title: Re: about Upload CSV File for Reassign Costs and Revenues
entry.content:
Hello,

Here's the answer provided by the expert:

Hi Miiwa, No, you shouldn't change the template. The template is preformatted. It contains fields that you must not re-order or remove. If you don't need to complete a field, then leave it blank.

There is an API available. You can find more information about it here:
https://api.sap.com/api/API_COSTREVNREASSIGNMENT/overview

Kind regards,
Martin

entry.title: ChaRM - Cannot select single transport for scheduled import
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I want to select a single urgent change to schedule it for import in our production environment.

See screenshot 1

Unfortunately, I cannot select different transports. The buttons are all greyed out. Can someone tell me, where I can change this behavior or why all this buttons are not selectable?

See screenshot 2

Best regards.

Markus

entry.title: Re: about Upload CSV File for Reassign Costs and Revenues
entry.content:
Hi Miiwa, No, you shouldn't change the template. The template is preformatted. It contains fields that you must not re-order or remove. If you don't need to complete a field, then leave it blank.

There is an API available. You can find more information about it here:
https://api.sap.com/api/API_COSTREVNREASSIGNMENT/overview

Kind regards,
Martin

entry.title: Authentication issues when using RESTful api C# for 4.2 BusinessObjects
entry.content:
Hi there,

I am trying to connect to the RESTful api using c#, but having some difficulties getting the syntax correct.

I'm currently receiving a 401 response error. I am an administrator and the RESTful base url is setup.

I have the required response body:

<attrs xmlns="http://www.sap.com/rws/bip">
<attr name="password" type="string"/>
<attr name="clientType" type="string"/>
<attr name="auth" type="string" possibilities="secEnterprise,secLDAP,secWinAD,secSAPR3">secEnterprise</attr>
<attr name="userName" type="string"/>
</attrs>

The C# code I'm using is:

        public async Task<string> AuthenticateAsync()
        {
            using (System.Net.Http.HttpClient client = new System.Net.Http.HttpClient())
            {
                // Construct the XML request body
                var requestBody = $@"
                    <attrs xmlns=""http://www.sap.com/rws/bip""> 
                        <attr name=""password"" type=""string"">{password}</attr>
                        <attr name=""clientType"" type=""string"">SDK</attr>
                        <attr name=""auth"" type=""string"" possibilities=""secEnterprise,secLDAP,secWinAD,secSAPR3"">secWinAD</attr>
                        <attr name=""userName"" type=""string"">{username}</attr>
                    </attrs>";

                StringContent content = new StringContent(requestBody, System.Text.Encoding.UTF8, "application/xml");
             
                var response = await client.PostAsync($"{baseUrl}/logon/long", content);
                GD.Print("response", response);

                if (response.IsSuccessStatusCode)
                {
                    var responseData = await response.Content.ReadAsStringAsync();
                    var xmlDoc = new System.Xml.XmlDocument();
                    xmlDoc.LoadXml(responseData);

                    // Assuming the token is in a specific XML element
                    var tokenNode = xmlDoc.SelectSingleNode("//attr[@name='LogonToken']");
                    if (tokenNode != null)
                {
                        string logonToken = tokenNode.InnerText.Trim();
                        return logonToken;
                }
                    else
                    {
                        throw new Exception("Token not found in the response.");
                    }
                }
                else
                {
                    throw new Exception("Authentication failed: " + response.ReasonPhrase);
                }
            }
        }

At this stage I comment out what's in the if statement as I am only interested in the response.

I have tried it without the clientType as I am not entirely sure what that needs to be.

I was hoping someone could see something I've missed.

Thanks,

Paul

entry.title: Re: How to migrate data with CDS view behaviour LTMOM
entry.content:
Hi Alex,

when you create a migration object based on a CDS View - there is not difference then using an API. You need to do the structure mapping, field mapping, then go to Migrate Your Data app and proceed here with download, populate excel and upload. 

Where are you stuck? After creating the object in the backend system, close LTMOM and proceed in Fiori app.

Hope this helps,

Sybille

Aimen

entry.title: Re: Unable to run Cloud Connector on M2 or Intel processo...
entry.content:
Hi @nkri

you should not modify the startup script. Instead, you should export JAVA_HOME pointing to the proper location. Furthermore, you need to provide an exception for the libsapscc20jni.dylib in security settings to be allowed to run, even though it is not notarized. 

Best regards,
Markus

entry.title: ByDesign Extension Scenario modify
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Is there any way to remove the exntension scenario from my solution in Cloud App Studio?

I've made a mistake, i didn't check a checkbox in the scenario, but i have to use it. But this was found after the assemble and download.

Now it's impossible to modify the extension field and the scenario (Screenshots are from the patch version)? I have to duplicate it?

I need only 1 of these fields, but the "Rendelheto1" is not modifiable anymore.

entry.title: Re: Downtime-Optimized Conversion(Doc) for SAP S/4HANA - Finance (Functional)

BR,

Viswa.S

entry.title: Copy file form fileserver with FTP with umlaut in file name
entry.content:
Hi,

Is it possible to copy .pdf files with an umlaut in the file name via FTP?

Copying via FTP with the function module FTP_COMMAND generally works, only for files with an umlaut (ä,ö,ü) the following message appears:

"451 No mapping for the Unicode character exists in the target multi-byte code page.

Messagenumber. 26000"

The FTP transfer is implemented as follows (excerpt from coding):

CALL FUNCTION 'FTP_CONNECT'.....

    CONCATENATE 'set passive on' ' ' INTO lv_ftpcom SEPARATED BY ' '.
    CALL FUNCTION 'FTP_COMMAND'
         EXPORTING: handle     = lv_handle
                    command    = lv_ftpcom
         TABLES:    data       = lt_ftp_result
         EXCEPTIONS: data_error = 1
                     OTHERS     = 2.

    CONCATENATE 'binary' ' ' INTO lv_ftpcom SEPARATED BY ' '.
    CALL FUNCTION 'FTP_COMMAND'
         EXPORTING: handle     = lv_handle
                    command    = lv_ftpcom
         TABLES:    data       = lv_ftp_result
         EXCEPTIONS: data_error = 1
                     OTHERS     = 2.

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: UNIT OF MEASURE DESCRIPTION
entry.content:
The UoM table T006 has a text table T006A to connect to.

Note that when making the connection you might need the internal key during coding. See example below where D for days is actually value 10 in the background.

entry.title: Re: BADI to validate while posting Journal entry
entry.content: Adding tag SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance

entry.title: Defect Tracking API data posted from CPI to S4 shown in Table QMFE but not in TCode QF21
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

There is one requirement to post the data using the defect tracking API which is successful from CPI to S4 with below details

/sap/opu/odata4/sap/api_defect/srvd_a2x/sap/defect/0001/Defect

<Defect>

<Defect_Type>

<DefectInternalID>00000000004</DefectInternalID>

<DefectText>test1</DefectText>

<DefectCodeCatalog>9</DefectCodeCatalog>

<DefectCode>1</DefectCode>

<DefectCodeGroup>QM-E</DefectCodeGroup>

<ManufacturingOrder>000012</ManufacturingOrder>

<InspectionLot>40000000008</InspectionLot>

<DefectCategory>01</DefectCategory>

</Defect_Type>

</Defect>

Even tried with all the 50+ fields of the API populated with the functional data provided but still the same issue.

The post is successful and we can see the data triggered from CPI in S4 in the actual table QMFE and even the GET API call also shows the values posted but its not reflecting in the actual TCODE QF21

If the functional owner is entering any data manually its also available in both backend table QMFE and TCODE QF21 but its not available in GET API call.

Does anyone know any case like this where the API is not working as expected.


Thanks,

Ahmed

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps Access User Identity Token
entry.content:
Hello Dan, 

Indeed, creating an OAuth2UserTokenExchange with the token link to our IAS worked. Kyma now receives the relevant JWT token as the authorization header.
